paper: TVC Study 11-Year Follow-Up (Verma-Fuehring et al., BMC Ophthalmology 2025)

key_improvements: Reference list expanded from 1 to 20 (10 PubMed-verified with PMID/DOI)
Discussion enriched with 9+ verified literature comparisons across 6 thematic paragraphs
Dedicated revision surgery paragraph with TVT benchmark (per Iter2 rule 12)
Baseline VF confounder explicitly discussed in Limitations (per Iter2 rule 13)
Ethics/IRB statement added to Methods (per Iter2 rule 10)
QoL comparison (Klink et al.) integrated into medication burden discussion
Complication rates contextualized with published literature ranges
Sample size calculation detail (80% power, 0.05 significance) added to Methods
37 data points verified (up from 34 in v1) -- 100% accuracy maintained

remaining_gaps: Age and sex demographics unavailable from web extraction
~10 references from original paper still unidentified
Number-at-risk data for KM plots unavailable
Statistical software/version not specified in original extraction
